title: Lab 23: Umask Defaults
description: Configure a user specific umask so new files and directories get the required default permissions.

tasks.title: Create the user veil23 and set its password to cinder9
tasks.prompt: Create the user veil23 and set its password to cinder9.

tasks.title: Configure the umask for user veil23 so that new
tasks.prompt: Configure the umask for user veil23 so that new regular files are created with mode 0640 and new directories are created with mode 0750 whenever the user logs in.

hints: Use a user login startup file.
Verify the resulting umask by creating a test file and a test directory as the target user.

checks.original_command: runuser -l veil23 -c 'rm -rf ~/veil23-check && mkdir ~/veil23-check && touch ~/veil23-check/file && mkdir ~/veil23-check/dir && stat -c %a ~/veil23-check/file ~/veil23-check/dir'
checks.command: runuser -l veil23 -c 'rm -rf ~/veil23-check && mkdir ~/veil23-check && touch ~/veil23-check/file && mkdir ~/veil23-check/dir && stat -c %a ~/veil23-check/file ~/veil23-check/dir'
